test_info.description: Tests the array-of-references syntax via a subheading with type [string]
test_info.syntax: ### Examples [[examples: [string]]] followed by a list of - [[#ref]]

current_behavior.issue: The parser interprets this as an array of objects (headers) rather than an array of references (markdown_list)

test_info.note: This test is expected to fail, showing that the parser does not handle the [[examples: [string]]] syntax with a list of references correctly. The parser needs to be fixed so it recognizes a list of references under a subheading with type [string] as an array of primitives (reference strings) rather than an array of objects.
